title: Protocol for Mouse Brain and SH-SY5Y Cell Sample Preparation for Electron Microscopy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5j9v2","text":"This protocol outlines the preparation of mouse cortical tissue and SH-SY5Y cells for electron microscopy (EM).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"83abf","text":"·       4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14ior","text":"·       2% Glutaraldehyde","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f6utj","text":"·       5% and 30% Sucrose solutions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"abr4v","text":"·       O.C.T. compound (TissueTek)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7bfcb","text":"·       Cryostat or vibratome","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"48nni","text":"·       Falcon tubes (15 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1vjv6","text":"·       Aclar coverslips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9gsis","text":"·       1× DPBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c080a","text":"·       Serum-depleted DMEM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4mmkv","text":"·       BSA-20 nm gold conjugate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Immediately after euthanasia, harvest mouse brains.
Fix cortices overnight at 4°C in 4% PFA and 2% glutaraldehyde.
Transfer tissues to a solution of 4% PFA, 2% glutaraldehyde, and 5% sucrose. Incubate overnight at 4°C.
Place tissues in 30% sucrose solution in 15 mL Falcon tubes at 4°C until they sink.
Embed sunk tissues in O.C.T. compound, freeze, and store at –80°C.

Cut coronal sections at a thickness specified by the electron microscopy facility using a cryostat or vibratome. This step depends on the specific requirements of the electron microscopy facility. Ensure that the appropriate fixative and section thickness are used according to the facility’s guidelines.
Seed 0.2 × 10⁶ SH-SY5Y wild-type, SLC45A1-KO, and rescue cells onto Aclar coverslips.
Wash cells with 1× DPBS and incubate in serum-depleted DMEM for 72 h.
Treat cells with 0.2 g/100 mL BSA-20 nm gold conjugate to label lysosomes, 9 hours before completing the 72-hour incubation period.

Wash cells with DPBS and fix samples with w/2% glutaraldehyde & 4% paraformaldehyde in 0.1M Sodium Cacodylate buffer, pH 7.4. Then move samples to 4°C. Ship samples to EM facility for further process. This step depends on the specific requirements of the electron microscopy facility. Ensure that the appropriate fixative according to the facility’s guidelines
creator: Ali Ghoochani
